subject: english

alignment_note: Singapore lower-primary listening/viewing progression supports attentive response and understanding.

alignment_note: Textbook topic vocabulary aligns with contextual word sound-form-meaning-use guidance.

subject: english
alignment_note: Interaction and respectful communication are central in Singapore speaking/representing and CPP functions.

alignment_note: CPP reading readiness and PYP visual language both use labels signs images and meaning-making; independent reading is not assumed.

subject: english

alignment_note: Home evidence supports participation reflection and learning strategy development but is family-operational not a formal standard outcome.

subject: maths
alignment_note: MPH Chapter 1 counting and representation align strongly with Singapore P1 whole-number content.
evidence_needed_for_progress: Child counts concrete objects with one-to-one correspondence and states total.

subject: maths
alignment_note: PYP Phase 1 number emphasizes concrete and symbolic representation of numbers.
evidence_needed_for_progress: Evidence of matching quantity numeral and number word or symbol.

subject: maths
alignment_note: China first-stage number requirements include comparing quantities and symbolic relationships.
evidence_needed_for_progress: Observation of comparing real sets or numbers with strategy noted.

subject: maths
alignment_note: Singapore P1 includes comparing and ordering numbers and ordinal numbers.
evidence_needed_for_progress: Evidence of ordering or comparing within the worked range without overclaiming transfer.

subject: maths
alignment_note: PYP Phase 1 number includes partitioning and combining; MPH number bonds give concrete diagrams.
evidence_needed_for_progress: Observed split/combine action with child explaining whole and parts.

subject: maths
alignment_note: MPH addition and Singapore P1 addition/subtraction content align directly.
evidence_needed_for_progress: Child combines quantities and connects action to addition language or equation.

subject: maths
alignment_note: MPH subtraction and Singapore P1 subtraction content align directly.
evidence_needed_for_progress: Child acts out take-away or count-back and explains what remains.

subject: maths
alignment_note: MPH story problems align with Singapore problem-solving emphasis; operation choice needs real evidence.
evidence_needed_for_progress: Observation of child choosing operation from a story and explaining why.

subject: maths
alignment_note: MPH shapes and Singapore P1 2D shape content align directly.
evidence_needed_for_progress: Child names sorts or describes shapes across different examples.

subject: maths
alignment_note: PYP Phase 1 emphasizes describing and sorting shapes by characteristics.
evidence_needed_for_progress: Observation of child using attribute language such as sides corners straight or curved.

subject: maths
alignment_note: MPH shape patterns align with PYP Phase 1 pattern identification extension and creation.
evidence_needed_for_progress: Evidence of extending or creating pattern and saying the rule.

subject: maths
alignment_note: Singapore P1 includes ordinal numbers; MPH adds positional language beyond ordinal sequence.
evidence_needed_for_progress: Observation of ordinal/position language with a clear start point or reference.

subject: maths
alignment_note: PYP shape/space Phase 1 directly includes position and direction language in play and games.
evidence_needed_for_progress: Evidence of placing or describing objects using position words.

subject: maths
alignment_note: China first-stage goals include length measurement experience and early measurement sense.
evidence_needed_for_progress: Observation of comparing length or height with fair alignment noted.

subject: maths
alignment_note: PYP Phase 1 measurement includes comparing and non-standard units in authentic contexts.
evidence_needed_for_progress: Evidence of using repeated equal units without gaps or overlaps.

subject: maths
alignment_note: Singapore assessment emphasizes reasoning communication and strategies; this supports progress evidence quality.
evidence_needed_for_progress: Child explains or shows strategy with objects gestures drawing or words.

subject: maths
alignment_note: MPH 1A has limited formal data; PYP and China support sorting and simple representation as adjacent foundation goals.
